vault_aware_draft.description: Generate text aware of vault + active file context, then polish.

grammar_fix.system: Fix grammar and spelling. Preserve meaning, voice, markdown, wikilinks, and code blocks. Return only the corrected text.

tone_align.description: Rewrite to match a persona's tone, preserving structure.
tone_align.system: Rewrite to match persona '{{persona.tone}}'. Keep all wikilinks, frontmatter, and code intact. Return only the rewritten text.

atomic_note.description: Convert input into an atomic Obsidian note.
atomic_note.system: Convert input into an atomic Obsidian note: 1 idea, YAML frontmatter with tags, [[links]] for entities, body under 200 words.

moc_builder.description: Build a Map-of-Content for the active vault.
moc_builder.system: Build a Map-of-Content for vault '{{vault.name}}'. Group {{user_input}} into 3-7 themes with [[wikilinks]]. Output markdown only.

tot_decompose.system: Generate 3 distinct approaches to: {{user_input}}. Score each 1-10 on novelty, feasibility, fit. Return the top as FINAL: ...

code_review.description: Review selected code for bugs, perf, and clarity.
code_review.system: Review the following code. List: (1) bugs, (2) perf issues, (3) clarity improvements. Be concrete. No compliments.
